metadata.purpose: Same model + backend, two different harnesses/scaffolds: attribute an effect to the harness rather than the model.
metadata.hold-fixed: provider + model identical; only `invocationPath` (and, for native-cli, the driving command) varies.
metadata.caveat: A harness contrast measures an END-TO-END treatment: the delta bundles system prompt, agent loop, tool protocol, parsing, retries, and context management. It cannot establish a model-INDEPENDENT harness effect from one model alone; cross several models with several harnesses for that. Also: native-cli cannot prove resolved model, so confirm the same backend served both arms out-of-band.
metadata.replace-before-running: Set the provider/model and the native-cli `command`/`args` to your real coding-agent CLI.
